description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-sided briefcase with a rich brown exterior that appears to be made of leather or a leather-like material. The surface shows subtle signs of wear, giving it a slightly vintage or well-used appearance. The front features a sturdy, matching brown handle and two black metal latches for secure closure, along with a small metallic nameplate or label at the center. The sides and back are plain, with the back showing only the hinge mechanisms. The briefcase is relatively slim, suggesting it is designed for carrying documents, a laptop, or other personal items. There are no visible external pockets, reinforcements, or brand logos, giving it a classic and understated look.
description: A brown, hard-sided leather briefcase with a sturdy handle and black metal latches, showing subtle wear and a classic, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown handle, two black latches, and a small metallic nameplate centered above the handle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain brown surface with the handle slightly visible, no additional features.
description_view_2: Back view revealing the plain brown surface and black hinge mechanisms, with no handle or latches visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the plain brown surface and a partial view of the handle, similar to the left side.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed, rectangular handle made of matching brown leather, attached with metal brackets to the front center of the briefcase.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two black metal latches located on the front, one on each side of the handle; no visible combination or key lock.
